title.ko: 차량 내 추진 장치 또는 변속기의 배치 또는 장착; 차량 내 복수의 다양한 동력원(PRIME-MOVER)의 배치 또는 장착; 차량용 보조 구동장치; 차량용 계기판 또는 대시보드; 차량 내 추진 장치의 냉각, 흡기, 배기 또는 연료 공급과 관련된 장치
title.en: ARRANGEMENT OR MOUNTING OF PROPULSION UNITS OR OF TRANSMISSIONS IN VEHICLES; ARRANGEMENT OR MOUNTING OF PLURAL DIVERSE PRIME-MOVERS IN VEHICLES; AUXILIARY DRIVES FOR VEHICLES; INSTRUMENTATION OR DASHBOARDS FOR VEHICLES; ARRANGEMENTS IN CONNECTION WITH COOLING, AIR INTAKE, GAS EXHAUST OR FUEL SUPPLY OF PROPULSION UNITS IN VEHICLES

definition.ko: 추진 유닛의 배치 전기; 증기 또는 가스; 내부연소 또는 제트 추진; 복수의 다양한 원동기 B60K1/00; B60K3/00; B60K5/00; B60K6/00 트랙션 휠에 내장되거나 인접한 모터 B60K7/00 다른 종류 B60K8/00 제어 장치의 배치 B60K26/00 안전장치 B60K28/00 변속기 또는 그 제어장치의 배치 B60K17/00, B60K23/00 가변 속도 기어 제어장치의 배치 B60K20/00 냉각장치, 공기흡입장치, 가스 배출 장치 또는 연료 공급 장치와 관련된 장치의 배치 B60K11/00, B60K13/00, B60K15/00 자연의 힘으로 전원 공급장치와 연결된 배치 B60K16/00 보조 구동 B60K25/00 제어의 종류 차량속도 자동 제어를 위한 부속품 B60K31/00 계기, 대시보드 B60K35/00, B60K37/00

title.ko: 전기 추진 장치의 배치 또는 설치 (B60K7/00이 우선; 상호 또는 공통추진을 위한 복수개의 서로 다른 원동기의 배치 또는 설치 B60K6/00)
title.en: Arrangement or mounting of propulsion units in vehicles

title.ko: 전기 추진 장치의 배치 또는 설치 (B60K7/00이 우선; 상호 또는 공통추진을 위한 복수개의 서로 다른 원동기의 배치 또는 설치 B60K6/00)
title.en: Arrangement or mounting of electrical propulsion units  (B60K0007000000 takes precedence; arrangement or mounting of plural diverse prime-movers for mutual or common propulsion B60K0006000000)
comprising more than one electric motor

title.ko: 추진용 축전장치를 갖는 것
title.en: of the electric storage means for propulsion

title.ko: 증기압 또는 가스압 추진 장치의 배치 또는 설치 (B60K7/00이 우선; 상호 또는 공통 추진을 위한 복수개의 서로 다른 원동기의 배치 또는 설치 B60K6/00)
title.en: Arrangement or mounting of steam or gaseous-pressure propulsion units  (B60K0007000000 takes precedence; arrangement or mounting of plural diverse prime-movers for mutual or common propulsion B60K0006000000)
of piston type
of turbine type

title.ko: 내연 또는 제트 추진장치의 배치 또는 설치(B60K 7/00이 우선; 상호 또는 공통 추진을 위한 원동기의 배치 또는 설치 B60K 6/00)
title.en: Arrangement or mounting of internal-combustion or jet-propulsion units (B60K0007000000 takes precedence;arrangement or mounting of plural diverse prime-movers for mutual or common propulsion B60K0006000000)
with the engine main axis, e.g. crankshaft axis, substantially in, or parallel to, the longitudinal centre line of the vehicle
with the engine main axis, e.g. crankshaft axis, transversely to the longitudinal centre line of the vehicle
with the engine main axis substantially vertical
comprising more than one engine
providing for ready detachment of engine
Arrangement of engine supports

title.ko: 상호 또는 공통 추진을 위한 복수의 다양한 동력원의 배치 또는 장착, 예. 전기 모터와 내연 기관을 포함하는 하이브리드 추진 시스템
title.en: Arrangement or mounting of plural diverse prime-movers for mutual or common propulsion, e.g. hybrid propulsion systems comprising electric motors and internal combustion engines

definition.ko: 이 그룹에서는 다음 표현들이 다음과 같은 의미로 사용된다: - "원동기"는 기계적 출력을 제공하는 추진 장치 또는 동력원을 의미한다, 예. 회전 축을 통해; - "하이브리드 전기 자동차[HEV]"는 전기 동력원과 내연기관을 가진 차량을 의미하며, 전기 동력원과 내연 기관이 단독으로 또는 결합하여 최종 추진 요소, 예. 바퀴, 를 구동하는 차량; - "에너지 저장 수단"은 추진 에너지를 저장하고 저장된 에너지를 동력원 또는 최종 추진 요소, 예. 바퀴, 를 구동하는 장치를 의미한다; - "모터 발전기"는 모터 또는 발전기와 같은 전기 기계 또는 이들의 기계적 결합체로서, 양의 기계적 출력힘 또는 토크를 제공할 수 있으며, 다른 경우에는 전기 발전기로서 기능할 수 있는 장치를 의미한다.

title.en: Prime-movers comprising combustion engines and mechanical or fluid energy storing means
by means of a chargeable mechanical accumulator, e.g. flywheel
by means of a chargeable fluidic accumulator

title.ko: 전기 원동기와 내연 엔진으로 구성된 원동기, 예. 하이브리드차량 (HEV)
title.en: the prime-movers consisting of electric motors and internal combustion engines, e.g. HEVs

definition.ko: 그룹 B60K6/22, B60K6/42, B60K6/50 중 하나를 분류하는 경우, 검색에 유용한 정보를 나타내는 것으로 간주되는 추가 기술 정보는 분류코드의 조합을 사용하여 조사를 할 수 있게하게 위해 메인그룹 B60K6/00의 다른 서브그룹에도 분류해야 합니다.

title.ko: 하이브리드차량에 특히 적합한 장치, 부품 또는 수단에 특징이 있는 것
title.en: characterised by apparatus, components or means specially adapted for HEVs
characterised by the combustion engines
characterised by the motors or the generators
characterised by the electric energy storing means, e.g. batteries or capacitors
characterised by chargeable mechanical accumulators, e.g. flywheels
characterised by the fuel cells
characterised by the absence of energy storing means
characterised by the transmission gearings
with the gears having orbital motion

title.ko: 동력전달계통(driveline, power train)의 클러치에 특징이 있는 것 (기어장치 내의 변속 클러치 또는 변속기 내의 변속 클러치는 B60K 6/36)
title.en: characterised by the driveline clutches (shift clutches within the gearing or transmission B60K0006360000)
One-way clutches or freewheel devices
Actuated clutches, i.e. clutches engaged or disengaged by electric, hydraulic or mechanical actuating means
characterised by the assembly or relative disposition of components
Housings
characterised by the architecture of the hybrid electric vehicle
Series-parallel type
Series-parallel switching type
Differential gearing distribution type
Electrical distribution type
Series type
Parallel type
Motor-assist type
Architecture of the driveline characterised by arrangement or kind of transmission units
Driving a plurality of drive axles, e.g. four-wheel drive
Transmission for changing ratio
the transmission being a continuously variable transmission
the transmission being a stepped gearing
Disposition of motor in, or adjacent to, traction wheel

title.ko: 메인그룹 B60K1/00 - B60K7/00 중 하나에 달리 분류되지 않는 추진 장치의 배치 또는 장착
title.en: Arrangement or mounting of propulsion units not provided for in one of main groups B60K0001000000-B60K0007000000
Arrangements in connection with cooling, air intake, gas exhaust, fuel supply, or power supply of propulsion units in vehicles
Arrangement in connection with cooling of propulsion units
with liquid cooling
Arrangement or mounting of radiators, radiator shutters, or radiator blinds
with air cooling
Air inlets for cooling; Shutters or blinds therefor
Arrangement in connection with combustion air intake or gas exhaust of propulsion units
concerning intake
concerning exhaust
using structural parts of the vehicle as ducts, e.g. frame parts

title.ko: 연소기관의 연료공급에 관한 배치; 연료탱크의 설치 또는 구조
title.en: Arrangement in connection with fuel supply of combustion engines; Mounting or construction of fuel tanks
Arrangement of fuel conduits

title.ko: 연료탱크
title.en: Fuel tanks
characterised by venting means

title.ko: 탱크 주입구(B60K 15/077이 우선)
title.en: Tank inlets (B60K0015077000 takes precedence)
Inlet covers
characterised by fuel reserve systems
Arrangement of tanks
Mounting of tanks
of gas tanks

title.ko: 특히 차량에 적합한 탱크구조(B60K 15/077이 우선)
title.en: Tank construction specially adapted to the vehicle (B60K0015077000 takes precedence)
with means modifying or controlling distribution or motion of fuel, e.g. to prevent noise, surge, splash or fuel starvation
concerning gas-producing plants

title.ko: 자연력, 예. 태양 또는 바람, 으로 인한 차량 내 추진 장치의 전원 공급과 관련된 장치 (자연력, 예. 태양 또는 바람, 으로부터 전력을 공급받는 전기 추진 B60L8/00; 차량에 장착하기 위해 특별히 설계된 풍력 원동기 F03D9/32)
title.en: Arrangements in connection with power supply of propulsion units in vehicles from forces of nature, e.g. sun or wind (electric propulsion with power supply from forces of nature, e.g. sun or wind, B60L0008000000;wind motors specially adapted for installation on vehicles F03D0009320000)

definition.ko: 이 그룹으로 분류할 때는 선박 풍력 추진에 적합한 돛 또는 밧줄 배치의 세부 사항은 서브 클래스 B63H 관련 그룹으로 분류된다, 예. 그룹 B63H8/00, B63H9/04

title.ko: 차량에 있어서의 동력전달장치의 배치 또는 설치
title.en: Arrangement or mounting of transmissions or their control in vehicles

title.ko: 차량에 있어서의 동력전달장치의 배치 또는 설치
title.en: Arrangement or mounting of transmissions in vehicles
characterised by arrangement, location, or kind of clutch

title.ko: 기어의 배치, 위치 또는 종류에 특징이 있는 것
title.en: characterised by arrangement, location or kind of gearing

title.ko: 변속전동장치(change-speed gearing) 에 관한것(17/10～ 17/16이 우선)
title.en: of change-speed gearing (B60K0017100000-B60K0017160000 take precedence)
of mechanical type
of fluid gearing
of electric gearing
the motor of fluid or electric gearing being disposed in, or adjacent to, traction wheel
of differential gearing
characterised by arrangement, location, or type of main drive shafting, e.g. cardan shaft
Arrangement of mountings for shafting
characterised by arrangement, location, or type of freewheel device
characterised by arrangement, location, or type of power take-off
the ultimate propulsive elements, e.g. ground wheels, being steerable
the ultimate propulsive elements, e.g. ground wheels, being rockable about a horizontal pivot

title.ko: 전륜와 후륜을 모두 구동하는 것, 예. 4륜 구동 차량
title.en: for driving both front and rear wheels, e.g. four wheel drive vehicles
having a longitudinal, endless element, e.g. belt or chain, for transmitting drive to wheels
having a transfer gear
the transfer gear being a differential gear

title.ko: 일조의 차륜을 구동하는 차동장치를 가지고 있는 것, 예. 후륜을 구동하면서 후륜과 같은 다른 속도의 차륜을 구동시키는 차동장치를 갖는 것(B60K 17/346이 우선)
title.en: having differential means for driving one set of wheels, e.g. the front, at one speed and the other set, e.g. the rear, at a different speeds (B60K0017346000 takes precedence)
including arrangements for suppressing or influencing the power transfer, e.g. viscous clutches
having separate mechanical assemblies for transmitting drive to the front or to the rear wheels or set of wheels
having fluid or electric motor, for driving one or more wheels
for driving tandem wheels
Arrangement or mounting of change-speed gearing control devices in vehicles
of initiating means
floor-mounted
mounted on steering column or the like
dashboard-mounted
Arrangement or mounting of control devices for vehicle transmissions, or parts thereof, not otherwise provided for
for main transmission clutches
for differential gearing
for freewheel devices
for changing number of driven wheels

title.ko: 보조 구동 장치 (차량에 장착된 타이어 팽창용 펌프의 배치 B60C23/10)
title.en: Auxiliary drives  (arrangement of tyre-inflating pumps mounted on vehicles B60C0023100000)
directly from an engine shaft
from static or dynamic pressure or vacuum, developed by the engine
from the transmission power take-off
from a ground wheel, e.g. engaging the wheel tread or rim
directly from oscillating movements due to vehicle running motion, e.g. suspension movement
Arrangement or mounting of propulsion-unit control devices in vehicles
of initiating means or elements
of means connecting initiating means or elements to propulsion unit

title.ko: 차량에 특히 적합하거나 차량에 배치된 추진 장치 제어용 안전 장치, 예. 잠재적으로 위험한 상황에서 연료 공급 또는 점화 방지 (전기 추진 차량의 전기 안전 장치 B60L3/00)
title.en: Safety devices for propulsion-unit control, specially adapted for, or arranged in, vehicles, e.g. preventing fuel supply or ignition in the event of potentially dangerous conditions (electric safety devices on electrically-propelled vehicles B60L0003000000)
responsive to conditions relating to the driver
responsive to presence or absence of the driver, e.g. to weight or lack thereof
responsive to incapacity of driver
responsive to conditions relating to the cargo, e.g. overload
responsive to conditions relating to the vehicle
responsive to conditions relating to doors or doors locks, e.g. open door
responsive to accident or emergency, e.g. deceleration, tilt of vehicle
responsive to, or preventing, spinning or skidding of wheels

Vehicle fittings, acting on a single sub-unit only, for automatically controlling vehicle speed, i.e. preventing speed from exceeding an arbitrarily established velocity or maintaining speed at a particular velocity, as selected by the vehicle operator
including electrically actuated servomechanism

and means for comparing one electrical quantity, e.g. voltage, pulse, waveform, flux, or the like, with another quantity of a like kind, which comparison means is involved in the development of an electrical signal which is fed into the controlling means
including fluid pressure actuated servomechanism
and one or more electrical components for establishing or regulating input pressure

and means for comparing one electrical quantity, e.g. voltage, pulse, waveform, flux, or the like, with another quantity of a like kind, which comparison means is involved in the development of a pressure which is fed into the controlling means
including a device responsive to centrifugal force
having an electrical switch which is caused to function by the centrifugal force
having means to prevent or discourage unauthorised use or adjusting of the controlling means
including a device to audibly, visibly, or otherwise signal the existence of unusual or unintended speed

title.ko: 차량용으로 특별히 개조된 악기; 차량 내부 또는 차량에 악기 배치
title.en: Instruments specially adapted for vehicles or dashboards; Arrangement of instruments or dashboards in or on vehicles

title.ko: 차량용으로 특별히 개조된 악기; 차량 내부 또는 차량에 악기 배치
title.en: Instruments specially adapted for vehicles; Arrangement of instruments in or on vehicles
Input arrangements, i.e. from user to vehicle, associated with vehicle functions or specially adapted therefor

title.ko: 출력 배열, 즉. 차량에서 사용자로, 차량 기능과 연관되거나 특별히 조정된 출력 배열
title.en: Output arrangements, i.e. from vehicle to user, associated with vehicle functions or specially adapted therefor

title.ko: 시각적 출력 사용, 예. 깜박이는 조명 또는 매트릭스 디스플레이
title.en: using visual output, e.g. blinking lights or matrix displays
characterised by the combination of multiple visual outputs, e.g. combined instruments with analogue meters and additional displays
Display screens

title.ko: 헤드업 디스플레이 [HUD](헤드업 디스플레이의 광학 측면 G02B27/01)
title.en: Head-up displays [HUD] (optical aspects of head-up displays G02B0027010000)
characterised by their arrangement or structure for integration into vehicles
controlling the projection distance of virtual images depending on the condition of the vehicle or the driver
controlling the size or position in display areas of virtual images depending on the condition of the vehicle or the driver
controlling the brightness, colour or contrast of virtual images depending on the driving conditions or on the condition of the vehicle or the driver
with means for detecting the driver’s gaze direction or eye points
using haptic output
using acoustic output

characterised by the type of the output information, e.g. video entertainment or vehicle dynamics information; characterised by the purpose of the output information, e.g. for attracting the attention of the driver
Instruments characterised by the way in which information is handled, e.g. showing information on plural displays or prioritising information according to driving conditions
Instruments specially adapted for improving the visibility thereof to the user, e.g. fogging prevention or anti-reflection arrangements

title.ko: 차량에 부착하거나 차량에 통합하는 수단이 특징인 계기(B60K35/231이 우선)
title.en: Instruments characterised by their means of attachment to or integration in the vehicle (B60K0035231000 takes precedence)
Movable instruments, e.g. slidable
Instruments with parts that can change their shape or position to configure an active screen, e.g. by folding or by rolling

title.ko: 차량 내 또는 차량의 위치 또는 상대적 성향에 따라 특징지어지는 계기(대시보드의 조명 장치 배열 B60Q3/10)
title.en: Instruments characterised by their location or relative disposition in or on vehicles (arrangements of lighting devices on dashboards B60Q0003100000)
Instruments specially adapted for specific vehicle types or users, e.g. for left- or right-hand drive
Instrument provisions for avoiding injuries to vehicle occupants in case of accidents
Arrangements for controlling instruments
for controlling displays
Arrangements for transferring vehicle- or driver-related data
Calibration of instruments, e.g. setting initial or reference parameters; Testing of instruments, e.g. detecting malfunction

title.ko: 대시보드(노면차량의 상부구조의 보조장치 B62D25/14)
title.en: Dashboards (as road-vehicle superstructure sub-units B62D0025140000)
Arrangements for attaching the dashboard to the vehicle
Dashboard panels
